grideye_init.tooltip: Initialize Panasonic GridEYE AMG88 8×8 thermal imaging sensor (I2C)

grideye_get_pixel_temp.tooltip: Read temperature of specified pixel (0-63) in °C

grideye_get_device_temp.tooltip: Read the GridEYE sensor's own temperature (°C)

grideye_set_framerate.tooltip: Set the output frame rate of GridEYE

grideye_power.tooltip: Wake up or put GridEYE to sleep

grideye_set_interrupt.message0: GridEYE %1 Set Interrupt Threshold Upper %2 °C Lower %3 °C
grideye_set_interrupt.tooltip: Set upper and lower temperature interrupt thresholds for GridEYE

grideye_moving_avg.tooltip: Enable or disable GridEYE moving average filter
